text:
Once upon a time in Maplewood Town, there was a mysterious figure known only as "The Whisperer." This odd man would travel from one corner of the town to another, leaving behind whispered songs about dreams and forgotten magic.

One quiet autumn evening, The Whisperer stopped at Willow Creek Park. A gentle breeze carried his voice as he sang:

"Where the cherry trees whisper secrets to the moon,
There I once met a princess, gentle and true.
With locks of silver hair, fair and kind,
She yearned for a kingdom where stories align."

A girl listened intently, her eyes wide with wonder. It was Ellie, a ten-year-old with dreams as big as the stars. She would often lose herself in fairy tales.

Moved by her fascination, The Whisperer continued:

"Underneath a midnight sky so pale,
She found a cradle of starlight, far apart.
They danced through starlight all night long,
Until the dawn broke with gentle tone."

Ellie sighed
